block_00: Information about the assets ProShares UltraPro Short QQQ (SQQQ), Apple (AAPL:US)& Tesla (TSLA:US)
block_02: We would like to inform you that the following assets: ProShares UltraPro Short QQQ (SQQQ), Apple (AAPL:US) & Tesla (TSLA:US) will be subject to a split on August the 18th and the 31st 2020 (AAPL:US & TSLA:US), respectively. Therefore, any open position(s) held in SQQQ will expire on August the 17th and positions held in AAPL:US & TSLA:US on the 28th 2020 with the last available closing price.
